settings.specifications_text:
Premium Material Options
Crafted with care, our drawstring bags are available in Cotton, Polyester, Satin, and Velvet. Each fabric is carefully selected to balance durability, softness, and visual appeal — making these bags ideal for daily use, gifting, and professional branding.

Sustainable Fabric Weights (150–250 GSM)
We offer a wide range of fabric weights, from 150 GSM for lightweight, giveaway-friendly drawstring bags to 250 GSM for premium, heavy-duty use. Made with eco-conscious cotton blends and long-lasting materials, these bags support sustainability while reducing single-use plastic waste. Our drawstring bags are available in a wide range of standard sizes to suit dierent packaging and storage needs: Each size is designed to oer a neat t, easy closure, and a polished look — making them suitable for retail, gifting, events, and branding purposes.

Custom Trim Choices
Personalize your drawstring bags with or without trim. The trimmed option adds a refined, professional finish, while the no-trim design delivers a clean, minimalist aesthetic — perfect for aligning with your brand identity.

Custom Printing Options
Transform your drawstring bag into a powerful branding tool with front-side printing for logos or artwork. For a more natural and understated look, choose the no-print option. Either way, your bag becomes a stylish, reusable brand touchpoint.

Flexible Order Quantities
Whether you need 50 bags for a small event, 100 for retail, or 300+ for large promotional campaigns, we support exible order quantities without compromising on quality.

Strong & Smooth Drawstrings
Each bag features durable cotton drawstrings designed for smooth closure and comfortable handling. Secure, reliable, and easy to use — even when carrying heavier items.

Spacious & Versatile Use
Perfect for gifting, retail packaging, events, travel, gym use, or storage, these drawstring bags combine practicality with modern design, making them suitable for both personal and commercial use.

Easy Care & Long Life
Maintenance is simple — Spot clean with a damp cloth. With proper care, they’re built to last for years, offering a sustainable alternative to disposable packaging.
settings.printing_text: Bring your ideas to life with vibrant, high-quality digital printing. Using eco-friendly, water-based inks, our process delivers sharp, durable, and long-lasting results. Whether your design is a simple one-color logo or a full spectrum of 100 colors, our advanced printing technique captures every detail with precision. From bold graphics to intricate artwork, your tote becomes a walking showcase for your brand.

settings.text1: Explore our curated range of ideas, goals, and essentials — all designed with quality and sustainability in mind.
settings.text2: Add your brand’s touch. Choose coffee, store, and custom prints to make each piece uniquely yours.
settings.text3: Our women-led teams get to work carefully bringing your design to life using ethical, zero-waste practices.
settings.text4: Your custom packaging is delivered, ready to impress — and designed to be trusted, re-bond, and remembered.

settings.testimonial: Kind of April has been our go-to for standout potli packaging. They’re responsive, detail-driven, and consistently deliver top-notch quality. KOA isn’t just a vendor—they’re a dependable partner who genuinely cares about our vision.

Working with KOA PACK was a smooth and seamless experience. They were prompt, responsive, and detail-oriented throughout the process. The quality of the tote bags was exactly what we hoped for—well-crafted and thoughtfully executed. Really appreciated how easy they were to coordinate with from start to finish. Would definitely work with them again.

Working with your team has been an absolute pleasure. From concept to execution, every detail was handled with care, creativity, and professionalism. The material you provide was not only unique but truly elevated our brand experience. Looking forward to many more collaborations ahead!✨

What i like about kind of April is their proactiveness. Once they picked our project, they quickly made it their own - sharing design inputs, going through iteration on materials and possibilities. Both, Sajan & Mansi, ensure that the best product is delivered. Thanks for the engaging experience team.
